allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import langchain, langchain_community, langchain_chroma, sentence_transformers, pypdf, chromadb; print\(''all imports OK''\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from fpdf import FPDF

def make_pdf\(path, prefix, n\):
    pdf = FPDF\(\)
    pdf.add_page\(\)
    pdf.set_font\('Helvetica', size=11\)
    pdf.set_margins\(15, 15, 15\)
    for i in range\(n\):
        text = f'{prefix} {i+1}: ' + 'This is sample text for RAG pipeline testing. ' * 6
        pdf.multi_cell\(0, 8, text\)
        pdf.ln\(2\)
    pdf.output\(path\)

make_pdf\('/tmp/sample1.pdf', 'Paragraph', 20\)
make_pdf\('/tmp/sample2.pdf', 'Section', 15\)
print\('PDFs created'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from app.main import app; print\('app imported OK'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(.venv/bin/python -W error::DeprecationWarning -c "from langchain_huggingface import HuggingFaceEmbeddings; print\('OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -W error::LangChainDeprecationWarning -c "
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings\('error', category=DeprecationWarning, message='.*LangChain.*'\)
from app.services.rag import _get_embeddings
print\('import OK — no LangChainDeprecationWarning'\)
" 2>&1)
